meta.title: ImpNeuRec — Premium Tire Trading
meta.description: Your trusted partner in premium tire distribution. Quality tires for every road, every vehicle, every journey.

hero.headline: Driving the World Forward
hero.subheadline: Premium tire distribution for every road, every vehicle, every journey.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Built on decades of expertise in the tire industry
about.description: ImpNeuRec is a leading tire trading company connecting top manufacturers with distributors and retailers worldwide. We specialize in sourcing high-quality tires across all categories, ensuring competitive pricing and reliable supply chains.

quality.title: Quality First
quality.description: Every tire we trade meets rigorous international quality and safety standards.

trust.title: Trusted Partners
trust.description: Long-standing relationships with the world's top tire manufacturers and brands.

service.title: Full Service
service.description: End-to-end logistics, competitive pricing, and dedicated account management.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Comprehensive tire solutions for every application

passenger.title: Passenger Tires
passenger.description: High-performance and all-season tires for sedans, hatchbacks, and coupes from leading global brands.

suv.title: SUV & 4x4 Tires
suv.description: All-terrain and highway tires engineered for SUVs, crossovers, and off-road vehicles.

commercial.title: Commercial Tires
commercial.description: Durable truck and van tires built for heavy loads, long distances, and maximum uptime.

industrial.title: Industrial Tires
industrial.description: Specialized tires for forklifts, loaders, agricultural equipment, and industrial machinery.

diff1.title: Global Network
diff1.description: Direct partnerships with manufacturers across Europe, Asia, and the Americas.

diff2.title: Competitive Pricing
diff2.description: Volume purchasing power that translates to better margins for your business.

diff3.title: Fast Logistics
diff3.description: Streamlined supply chain with warehousing and delivery across multiple continents.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by distributors and retailers worldwide

t1.text: ImpNeuRec has been our primary tire supplier for over 5 years. Their reliability and product range are unmatched in the industry.
t1.author: Carlos Mendes

t2.text: The team at ImpNeuRec understands our market needs. Fast deliveries, competitive prices, and outstanding customer service.
t2.author: Maria Fernández

t3.text: We switched to ImpNeuRec two years ago and haven't looked back. Their product quality and logistics are world-class.
t3.author: Hans Weber
